problem.body: Screens, stress, poor posture and intense training keep your body in a permanent recovery deficit. RECOVERY SYSTEM™ is built to close that gap every day.
items: Neck tension from office and gaming
Mental fatigue and low daytime energy
No real decompression ritual for stress
